name: PFEmptyState
description: Guided unoccupied-room pattern for absence of content and next steps.
responsibility: Explain absence of content and guide the user toward the next meaningful action.

requirements: Messages must remain readable and explicit.
Actions must be reachable by keyboard.
Decorative illustration must not be required to understand the message.

composition_rules: Offer one clear next step where possible.
anti_patterns: empty states that only apologize without guiding next action
illustration-first empty states that hide the message
